arts.ttl: Team News: Sole change for Palace's trip to Fulham
arts.sum: Manager Oliver Glasner has made one change to his Crystal Palace team, with Ebere Eze returning to the Eagles XI, replacing Justin Devenny.

arts.ttl: Live Blog: Fulham v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace return to action against Fulham this afternoon (15:00 GMT) in the Premier League looking to continue our strong away run of form.

arts.ttl: Marco Silva offers Ruben Amorim example as Fulham boss eyes more Man Utd misery
arts.sum: Marco Silva is now the fourth-longest serving manager in the Premier League and his work at Fulham serves as an example for compatriot Ruben Amorim at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace in picture to sign Watford man – Player could ‘embrace new challenge’ next season
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have identified Watford’s Edo Kayembe as a transfer target for next season, according to Africa Foot. The midfielder arrived at Vicarage Road from Belgian side KAS Eupen in January 2022 and has been a regular since last season. arts.ttl: “I gave approval” – Manager reveals giving go-ahead to sign Fulham player, disappointed he ‘didn’t arrive’
arts.sum: Palmeiras have ended their pursuit of Fulham’s Andreas Pereira after chasing him for the last two months. The Brazilian transfer window is open until February 28th and Palmeiras president Leila Pereira initially went public over her side’s desire to sign the midfielder. She and her side were frustrated with their failure to secure his services. The post “I gave approval” – Manager reveals giving go-ahead to sign Fulham player, disappointed he ‘didn’t arrive’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner provides Matheus Franca return update after starting for Crystal Palace’s U21 side
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner confirmed that Matheus Franca will not be in the Crystal Palace squad against Fulham on Saturday despite making a playing return for the U21s on Monday evening. “We don’t know what will happen this week,” said Glasner of possible minutes for Franca.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'weighing up' summer move for Crystal Palace star to solve issue in squad
arts.sum: Manchester United could allegedly make a summer move for Crystal Palace central midfielder Adam Wharton.

arts.ttl: Lacroix on Palace mentality for Fulham trip
arts.sum: Maxence Lacroix says Crystal Palace head to Fulham on Saturday seeking to avenge the result of the reverse fixture earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Crystal Palace Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Crystal Palace will look to maintain their great away form when they travel to Fulham for another London Derby in the Premier League today. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the ga...

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Crystal Palace travel to Fulham in the Premier League. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.
